title: Toy Hub Glow in the Dark Tattoos
description: Product description This easy to function tattoo set will allow your child to put tattoos of cool, unique and interesting symbols on their body, in seconds. The tattoos are easy to apply and wash off, making the product both child friendly and functional. With 2 sheets and 20 tattoos to choose from, you can glow in the dark in less than a minute with the Glow In The Dark Tattoos. Safety Warning Warning Not suitable for children under 3 years
